notes: Update detection fix. The version-check was hitting raw.githubusercontent.com, which has a 5–30 minute CDN cache that the client's no-store can't defeat — meaning a freshly pushed release would say 'Up to date' until the upstream cache expired. Switched to the same-origin URL (./version.json on GitHub Pages, which propagates pushes within ~1 minute) and added a cache-bust query parameter to defeat any remaining cache layer. The service worker now also bypasses version.json entirely so its own cache can't hold a stale response. Also includes the v1.7.3 changes: stronger follow highlight (22% blue / 3px bar) and amber-when-off / blue-when-on Follow chip.
